import React from "react"; import { MapPin, Star, Clock } from "lucide-react"; import { Card, CardTitle, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardContent, CardDescription, } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Avatar, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar"; const data = [ { "layout": "centered", "avatarInitials": "JD", "name": "John Doe", "role": "Senior Developer", "stats": { "posts": "124", "followers": "8.2k", "following": "256" }, "primaryButton": "Follow", "secondaryButton": "Message" }, { "layout": "header", "avatarInitials": "SM", "name": "Sarah Miller", "location": "San Francisco, CA", "bio": "Product Designer with 8+ years of experience. Passionate about creating beautiful and functional interfaces.", "badges": [ "UI/UX", "Design Systems", "Figma" ], "rating": "4.9", "joined": "2019" } ]; export default function CardProfileExample() { return (
{data.map((profile, index) => ( profile.layout === "centered" ? (
{profile.avatarInitials}

{profile.name}

{profile.role}

{profile.stats?.posts}

Posts

{profile.stats?.followers}

Followers

{profile.stats?.following}

Following

 ) : ( {profile.avatarInitials}
{profile.name} {profile.location}

{profile.bio}

{profile.badges?.map((badge, i) => ( {badge} ))}
{profile.rating} rating Joined {profile.joined} ) ))}
); }
